ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_ENABLER.title: Enable Ancients
Determines if Mithrix can spawn or not.
(Can work mid-run if Ancient hasn't been rolled yet.)
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ENABLE_SEBASTIAN_ANCIEN:
Determines if Sebastian can spawn or not.
(Can work mid-run if Ancient hasn't been rolled yet.)
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_FORCER.title: Force Ancients
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FORCE_MITHRIX_ENABLER.h: Force spawn Mithrix in Act 3 (may cause conflicts)
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FORCE_SEBASTIAN_ENABLER: Force spawn Sebastian in Act 2 (may cause conflicts)
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX.title: Mithrix Relic Configs
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MULTIPLAYER_FLAWLESS_HA: Disabled on default due to extra turns being not very multiplayer friendly.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MULTIPLAYER_MONSOON_CHA: Disabled on default due to griefing potential.
